articles.title: France-Morocco was a fitting end to a spectacular World Cup in Boston
articles.description:
Things could not have gone much better for the city of Boston during its one month hosting the 2026 World Cup.

The post France-Morocco was a fitting end to a spectacular World Cup in Boston appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston successfully hosted the 2026 World Cup, enhancing its global sports reputation.
France-Morocco match capped off a month of events, attracting thousands of fans.
Local businesses reported increased revenue during the World Cup, boosting the economy.

articles.title: Gloucester woman accused of plotting to kill childhood friend using WD-40
articles.description:
Phyllis Palazzola allegedly told her friend she wanted to drive them both off a bridge, adding, “I was gonna kill us both.”

The post Gloucester woman accused of plotting to kill childhood friend using WD-40 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Phyllis Palazzola, 50, allegedly plotted to kill her childhood friend using WD-40.
Palazzola reportedly expressed intentions to drive off a bridge with her friend.
The incident raises concerns about mental health and safety in Gloucester.

articles.title: How a Waltham barber became France’s go-to during the World Cup
articles.description:
After a "random" WhatsApp message, Mobar owner Coco Fernandez became a trusted barber for Kylian Mbappé, Ousmane Dembélé, and France's national team.

The post How a Waltham barber became France’s go-to during the World Cup appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Waltham barber Coco Fernandez became France's trusted barber during the World Cup.
Fernandez styled hair for star players like Kylian Mbappé and Ousmane Dembélé.
His success highlights local talent's global reach, boosting Waltham's visibility.

articles.title: Red Sox face lengthy travel issues ahead of series vs. Mets
articles.description:
The Red Sox weren't able to leave Chicago until approximately 3 p.m. ET for their 7:15 p.m. ET game Friday.

The post Red Sox face lengthy travel issues ahead of series vs. Mets appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox departed Chicago at 3 p.m. ET for a 7:15 p.m. ET game.
Travel delays could affect player performance and fan attendance at Fenway Park.
Boston fans may experience changes in game schedule due to travel issues.

articles.title: Photos: See breathtaking tall ships sail toward Boston
articles.description:
A fleet of international tall ships will arrive in Boston for the six-day Sail Boston event, starting July 11.

The post Photos: See breathtaking tall ships sail toward Boston appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: International tall ships will arrive in Boston for Sail Boston starting July 11.
The event lasts six days, attracting visitors and boosting local tourism.
Residents can enjoy unique maritime displays and cultural activities throughout the event.
